name: putnam_1977_a2
proposed_answer: fun a b c d => a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0)
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1977_a2 : ∃ (putnam_1977_a2_solution : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → Prop), (∀ (a b c d : ℝ), a ≠ (0 : ℝ) → b ≠ (0 : ℝ) → c ≠ (0 : ℝ) → d ≠ (0 : ℝ) → (putnam_1977_a2_solution a b c d ↔ a + b + c = d ∧ (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d)) := by
  use (fun a b c d => a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0) : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → Prop)
  intro a b c d ha hb hc hd
  have h_main : (a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0)) ↔ a + b + c = d ∧ (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := by
    constructor
    · 
      rintro ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
      have h₃ : a + b + c = d := h₁
      have h₄ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := h₂
      constructor
      · 
        exact h₃
      · 
        have h₅ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := by

          rcases h₄ with (h₄ | h₄ | h₄)
          · 
            have h₅ : b = -a := by linarith
            have h₆ : d = c := by linarith
            rw [h₆, h₅]
            have h₇ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / (-a) + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / c := by
              have h₈ : (1 : ℝ) / (-a) = -(1 / a) := by
                field_simp [ha, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [ha]
                <;> ring
              rw [h₈]
              ring
              <;> field_simp [ha, hc]
              <;> ring
            rw [h₇]
            <;> field_simp [hc, hd]
            <;> ring
          · 
            have h₅ : c = -b := by linarith
            have h₆ : d = a := by linarith
            rw [h₆, h₅]
            have h₇ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / (-b) = (1 : ℝ) / a := by
              have h₈ : (1 : ℝ) / (-b) = -(1 / b) := by
                field_simp [hb, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [hb]
                <;> ring
              rw [h₈]
              ring
              <;> field_simp [ha, hb]
              <;> ring
            rw [h₇]
            <;> field_simp [ha, hd]
            <;> ring
          · 
            have h₅ : a = -c := by linarith
            have h₆ : d = b := by linarith
            rw [h₆, h₅]
            have h₇ : (1 : ℝ) / (-c) + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / b := by
              have h₈ : (1 : ℝ) / (-c) = -(1 / c) := by
                field_simp [hc, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [hc]
                <;> ring
              rw [h₈]
              ring
              <;> field_simp [hb, hc]
              <;> ring
            rw [h₇]
            <;> field_simp [hb, hd]
            <;> ring
        exact h₅
    · 
      rintro ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
      have h₃ : a + b + c = d := h₁
      have h₄ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₂
      have h₅ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
        by_contra! h

        have h₆ : a + b ≠ 0 := h.1
        have h₇ : b + c ≠ 0 := h.2.1
        have h₈ : c + a ≠ 0 := h.2.2

        have h₉ : (a + b) * (b + c) * (c + a) ≠ 0 := by
          apply mul_ne_zero
          · apply mul_ne_zero h₆ h₇
          · exact h₈
        have h₁₀ : (a + b) * (b + c) * (c + a) = 0 := by
          have h₁₁ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₄
          have h₁₂ : a + b + c = d := h₃
          have h₁₃ : d ≠ 0 := hd
          have h₁₄ : a ≠ 0 := ha
          have h₁₅ : b ≠ 0 := hb
          have h₁₆ : c ≠ 0 := hc
          field_simp [h₁₄, h₁₅, h₁₆, h₁₃, h₁₂] at h₁₁
          ring_nf at h₁₁ ⊢
          nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₁₄, sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₁₅, sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₁₆,
            mul_self_pos.mpr (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₆), mul_self_pos.mpr (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₇),
            mul_self_pos.mpr (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₈)]
        exact h₉ h₁₀
      exact ⟨h₃, h₅⟩
  simpa using h_main

name: putnam_1977_a3
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1977_a3 : ∃ (putnam_1977_a3_solution : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)), ∀ (f g h : ℝ → ℝ), ((∀ (x : ℝ), f x = (h (x + (1 : ℝ)) + h (x - (1 : ℝ))) / (2 : ℝ)) ∧ (∀ (x : ℝ), g x = (h (x + (4 : ℝ)) + h (x - (4 : ℝ))) / (2 : ℝ))) → (h = putnam_1977_a3_solution f g) := by
  use (fun f g x => g x - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ))
  intro f g h hfg
  have h_main : ∀ (x : ℝ), h x = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := by
    intro x
    have h1 : f (x + 3) = (h ((x + 3) + 1) + h ((x + 3) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h1' := hfg.1 (x + 3)
      norm_num at h1' ⊢
      <;> linarith
    have h2 : f (x + 1) = (h ((x + 1) + 1) + h ((x + 1) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h2' := hfg.1 (x + 1)
      norm_num at h2' ⊢
      <;> linarith
    have h3 : f (x - 1) = (h ((x - 1) + 1) + h ((x - 1) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h3' := hfg.1 (x - 1)
      norm_num at h3' ⊢
      <;> linarith
    have h4 : f (x - 3) = (h ((x - 3) + 1) + h ((x - 3) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h4' := hfg.1 (x - 3)
      norm_num at h4' ⊢
      <;> linarith
    have h5 : g x = (h (x + 4) + h (x - 4)) / 2 := by
      have h5' := hfg.2 x
      norm_num at h5' ⊢
      <;> linarith

    calc
      h x = h x := rfl
      _ = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := by
        rw [h5, h1, h2, h3, h4]

        ring_nf
        <;> field_simp
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> linarith

  have h_final : h = (fun f g x => g x - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)) f g := by
    funext x
    have h₁ : h x = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := h_main x
    have h₂ : (fun f g x => g x - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)) f g x = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := by
      simp
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all
      <;> linarith
    rw [h₂]
    linarith

  exact h_final

name: putnam_1986_a1
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1986_a1 : ∃ (putnam_1986_a1_solution : ℝ), ∀ (S : Set ℝ), ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ), ((S = {x : ℝ | x ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ)}) ∧ (f = fun (x : ℝ) => x ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x)) → (IsGreatest {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 ∈ S, f x_1 = x} putnam_1986_a1_solution) := by
  use ((18 : ℝ) : ℝ)
  intro S f h
  have h₁ : IsGreatest {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 ∈ S, f x_1 = x} (18 : ℝ) := by
    have h₂ : S = {x : ℝ | x ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ)} := h.1
    have h₃ : f = fun (x : ℝ) => x ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x := h.2
    have h₄ : IsGreatest {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 ∈ S, f x_1 = x} (18 : ℝ) := by
      constructor
      · 
        have h₅ : (18 : ℝ) ∈ {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 ∈ S, f x_1 = x} := by

          have h₆ : (3 : ℝ) ∈ S := by
            rw [h₂]
            norm_num [pow_succ]
            <;>
            ring_nf
            <;>
            norm_num
            <;>
            linarith
          use 3, h₆
          simp only [h₃]
          norm_num
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          norm_num
        exact h₅
      · 
        rintro x ⟨x₁, hx₁, hx₁'⟩
        have h₇ : x ≤ (18 : ℝ) := by
          have h₈ : x₁ ∈ S := hx₁
          have h₉ : f x₁ = x := by simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
          have h₁₀ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
            rw [h₂] at h₈
            exact h₈
          have h₁₁ : f x₁ = x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x₁ := by
            simp [h₃]
            <;>
            ring_nf
          rw [h₁₁] at h₉
          have h₁₂ : x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x₁ = x := by linarith
          have h₁₃ : x₁ ^ 2 ≥ 4 := by
            have h₁₄ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := h₁₀
            have h₁₅ : x₁ ^ 2 ≥ 4 := by
              by_contra h₁₅
              have h₁₆ : x₁ ^ 2 < 4 := by linarith
              have h₁₇ : x₁ ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 4), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9)]
            exact h₁₅
          have h₁₄ : x₁ ^ 2 ≤ 9 := by
            have h₁₅ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := h₁₀
            have h₁₆ : x₁ ^ 2 ≤ 9 := by
              by_contra h₁₆
              have h₁₇ : x₁ ^ 2 > 9 := by linarith
              have h₁₈ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) > (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
                have h₁₉ : x₁ ^ 2 > 9 := by linarith
                have h₂₀ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) = x₁ ^ 2 * x₁ ^ 2 := by ring
                rw [h₂₀] at *
                nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9)]
              nlinarith
            exact h₁₆
          have h₁₅ : x ≤ (18 : ℝ) := by
            nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - 3), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 3), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9),
              sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 4), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 5), sq_nonneg (x₁ - 2),
              sq_nonneg (x₁ + 2), sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 1)]
          exact h₁₅
        exact h₇
    exact h₄
  exact h₁

name: putnam_1986_b1
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open  Real Equiv
theorem putnam_1986_b1 : ∃ (putnam_1986_b1_solution : ℝ), ∀ (b h : ℝ), ((b > (0 : ℝ) ∧ h > (0 : ℝ) ∧ b ^ (2 : ℕ) + h ^ (2 : ℕ) = (2 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ)) ∧ (b * h = 0.5 * b * ((1 : ℝ) - h / (2 : ℝ)))) → (h = putnam_1986_b1_solution) := by
  use ((2 : ℝ) / 5 : ℝ)
  intro b h h₀
  have h_main : h = (2 : ℝ) / 5 := by
    have h₁ : b > 0 := h₀.1.1
    have h₂ : h > 0 := h₀.1.2.1
    have h₃ : b ^ 2 + h ^ 2 = 4 := by
      norm_num [pow_two] at h₀ ⊢
      <;> nlinarith
    have h₄ : b * h = 0.5 * b * (1 - h / 2) := by
      simpa [mul_comm] using h₀.2
    have h₅ : 2 * b * h = b * (1 - h / 2) := by
      ring_nf at h₄ ⊢
      nlinarith
    have h₆ : b ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have h₇ : 2 * h = 1 - h / 2 := by
      apply mul_left_cancel₀ h₆
      nlinarith
    have h₈ : 4 * h = 2 - h := by
      nlinarith
    have h₉ : 5 * h = 2 := by
      nlinarith
    have h₁₀ : h = 2 / 5 := by
      nlinarith
    exact h₁₀
  exact h_main

name: putnam_1988_b2
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open Set Filter Topology
theorem putnam_1988_b2 : ∃ (putnam_1988_b2_solution : Prop), ((∀ (x y : ℝ), y ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ y * (y + (1 : ℝ)) ≤ (x + (1 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) → y * (y - (1 : ℝ)) ≤ x ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ putnam_1988_b2_solution) := by
  use (True : Prop)
  have h_main : (∀ (x y : ℝ), y ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ y * (y + (1 : ℝ)) ≤ (x + (1 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) → y * (y - (1 : ℝ)) ≤ x ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ (True : Prop) := by
    constructor
    · 
      intro h
      trivial
    · 
      intro h
      intro x y hxy
      have h₁ : y ≥ 0 := hxy.1
      have h₂ : y * (y + 1) ≤ (x + 1) ^ 2 := by
        norm_cast at hxy ⊢
        <;> nlinarith
      have h₃ : y * (y - 1) ≤ x ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + 1 - y), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (x + 1 + y),
          sq_nonneg (x - y + 1), sq_nonneg (x + y - 1), sq_nonneg (x - y - 1),
          sq_nonneg (y - x - 1), sq_nonneg (y + x - 1)]
      exact h₃
  exact h_main

name: putnam_1990_a1
proposed_answer: (fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n)
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open Filter Topology Nat
theorem putnam_1990_a1 : ∃ (putnam_1990_a1_solution : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)), ∀ (T : ℕ → ℤ), ((T (0 : ℕ) = (2 : ℤ) ∧ T (1 : ℕ) = (3 : ℤ) ∧ T (2 : ℕ) = (6 : ℤ)) ∧ (∀ (n : ℕ), T (n + (3 : ℕ)) = ((↑n : ℤ) + (7 : ℤ)) * T (n + (2 : ℕ)) - (4 : ℤ) * ((↑n : ℤ) + (3 : ℤ)) * T (n + (1 : ℕ)) + ((4 : ℤ) * (↑n : ℤ) + (4 : ℤ)) * T n)) → (T = putnam_1990_a1_solution.1 + putnam_1990_a1_solution.2) := by
  use ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ))
  intro T hT
  have h_main : ∀ n : ℕ, T n = (Nat.factorial n : ℤ) + (2 : ℤ) ^ n := by
    have h₁ : T 0 = (2 : ℤ) := hT.1.1
    have h₂ : T 1 = (3 : ℤ) := hT.1.2.1
    have h₃ : T 2 = (6 : ℤ) := hT.1.2.2
    have h₄ : ∀ (n : ℕ), T (n + 3) = ((↑n : ℤ) + (7 : ℤ)) * T (n + 2) - (4 : ℤ) * ((↑n : ℤ) + (3 : ℤ)) * T (n + 1) + ((4 : ℤ) * (↑n : ℤ) + (4 : ℤ)) * T n := hT.2
    intro n
    have h₅ : T n = (Nat.factorial n : ℤ) + (2 : ℤ) ^ n := by
      have h₅₁ : ∀ n : ℕ, T n = (Nat.factorial n : ℤ) + (2 : ℤ) ^ n := by
        intro n
        induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
        | h n ih =>
          match n with
          | 0 =>
            norm_num [Nat.factorial] at h₁ ⊢
            <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial]
            <;> ring_nf at *
            <;> norm_num at *
            <;> linarith
          | 1 =>
            norm_num [Nat.factorial] at h₁ h₂ ⊢
            <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial]
            <;> ring_nf at *
            <;> norm_num at *
            <;> linarith
          | 2 =>
            norm_num [Nat.factorial] at h₁ h₂ h₃ ⊢
            <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial]
            <;> ring_nf at *
            <;> norm_num at *
            <;> linarith
          | n + 3 =>
            have h₅₂ := h₄ n
            have h₅₃ := ih n (by omega)
            have h₅₄ := ih (n + 1) (by omega)
            have h₅₅ := ih (n + 2) (by omega)
            simp [Nat.factorial, pow_succ, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat] at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢
            <;> ring_nf at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢
            <;> norm_num at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢
            <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try ring_nf at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢) <;>
            (try norm_num at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢) <;>
            (try nlinarith) <;>
            (try
              {
                cases n with
                | zero => norm_num at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢ <;> linarith
                | succ n =>
                  cases n with
                  | zero => norm_num at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢ <;> linarith
                  | succ n =>
                    cases n with
                    | zero => norm_num at h₅₂ h₅₃ h₅₄ h₅₅ ⊢ <;> linarith
                    | succ n =>
                      simp_all [Nat.factorial, pow_succ, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat]
                      <;> ring_nf at *
                      <;> norm_num at *
                      <;> nlinarith
              })
      exact h₅₁ n
    exact h₅
  have h_final : T = ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)).1 + ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)).2 := by
    funext n
    have h₁ : T n = (Nat.factorial n : ℤ) + (2 : ℤ) ^ n := h_main n
    have h₂ : ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)).1 n = (Nat.factorial n : ℤ) := by
      simp
    have h₃ : ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)).2 n = (2 : ℤ) ^ n := by
      simp
    have h₄ : T n = ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)).1 n + ((fun n : ℕ => (Nat.factorial n : ℤ), fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n) : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)).2 n := by
      rw [h₁, h₂, h₃]
      <;> ring
    exact h₄
  exact h_final

name: putnam_1998_b1
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open Set Function Metric
theorem putnam_1998_b1 : ∃ (putnam_1998_b1_solution : ℝ), (sInf {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x} = putnam_1998_b1_solution) := by
  use ((6 : ℝ) : ℝ)
  have h_main : sInf {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x} = (6 : ℝ) := by
    have h₁ : (6 : ℝ) ∈ {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x} := by

      refine' ⟨1, by norm_num, _⟩
      norm_num
      <;>
      simp [pow_succ]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      field_simp
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      norm_num

    have h₂ : ∀ x ∈ {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x}, x ≥ (6 : ℝ) := by
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨x₁, hx₁_pos, hx₁⟩
      have h₃ : x₁ > 0 := hx₁_pos
      have h₄ : ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x := hx₁
      have h₅ : x ≥ (6 : ℝ) := by

        have h₅₁ : x₁ > 0 := hx₁_pos
        have h₅₂ : ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ))) = 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) := by

          have h₅₃ : x₁ ≠ 0 := by linarith
          have h₅₄ : x₁ + 1 / x₁ ≥ 2 := by
            have h₅₄₁ : x₁ + 1 / x₁ - 2 = (x₁ - 1) ^ 2 / x₁ := by
              field_simp [h₅₃]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> field_simp [h₅₃]
              <;> ring_nf
            have h₅₄₂ : (x₁ - 1) ^ 2 / x₁ ≥ 0 := by
              apply div_nonneg
              · exact sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1)
              · linarith
            linarith
          have h₅₅ : ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ))) = 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) := by
            have h₅₅₁ : (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 = (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 := rfl
            have h₅₅₂ : (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 6 = (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 6 := rfl
            have h₅₅₃ : x₁ ^ 6 + 1 / x₁ ^ 6 = (x₁ ^ 3 + 1 / x₁ ^ 3) ^ 2 - 2 := by
              have h₅₅₄ : x₁ ≠ 0 := by linarith
              field_simp [h₅₅₄]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> field_simp [h₅₅₄]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 3 - 1)]
            have h₅₅₄ : x₁ ^ 3 + 1 / x₁ ^ 3 = (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 - 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) := by
              have h₅₅₅ : x₁ ≠ 0 := by linarith
              field_simp [h₅₅₅]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> field_simp [h₅₅₅]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 1)]
            have h₅₅₅ : ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) = 6 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 4 - 9 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 2 := by
              have h₅₅₆ : x₁ ≠ 0 := by linarith
              field_simp [h₅₅₆]
              <;> ring_nf at *
              <;> field_simp [h₅₅₆] at *
              <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 + 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 3 - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 3 + 1)]
            have h₅₅₆ : ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ))) = 2 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 - 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) := by
              have h₅₅₇ : x₁ ≠ 0 := by linarith
              field_simp [h₅₅₇]
              <;> ring_nf at *
              <;> field_simp [h₅₅₇] at *
              <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 + 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 3 - 1), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 3 + 1)]
            calc
              ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x₁ + (1 : ℝ) / x₁) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x₁ ^ (3 : ℕ))) = (6 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 4 - 9 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 2) / (2 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 - 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁)) := by
                rw [h₅₅₅, h₅₅₆]
              _ = 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) := by
                have h₅₅₇ : x₁ ≠ 0 := by linarith
                have h₅₅₈ : (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ≥ 2 := by
                  have h₅₅₉ : x₁ + 1 / x₁ - 2 = (x₁ - 1) ^ 2 / x₁ := by
                    field_simp [h₅₅₇]
                    <;> ring_nf
                    <;> field_simp [h₅₅₇]
                    <;> ring_nf
                  have h₅₅₁₀ : (x₁ - 1) ^ 2 / x₁ ≥ 0 := by
                    apply div_nonneg
                    · exact sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1)
                    · linarith
                  linarith
                have h₅₅₉ : 2 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 - 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) > 0 := by
                  nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x₁ + 1 / x₁) - 2), sq_nonneg ((x₁ + 1 / x₁) + 2)]
                have h₅₅₁₀ : 6 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 4 - 9 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 2 = 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) * (2 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ^ 3 - 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁)) := by
                  nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x₁ + 1 / x₁) - 2), sq_nonneg ((x₁ + 1 / x₁) + 2)]
                rw [h₅₅₁₀]
                field_simp [h₅₅₉.ne']
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [h₅₅₇]
                <;> nlinarith
              _ = 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) := by rfl
          rw [h₅₅]
        rw [h₅₂] at h₄
        have h₅₃ : 3 * (x₁ + 1 / x₁) ≥ 6 := by
          have h₅₃₁ : x₁ + 1 / x₁ ≥ 2 := by
            have h₅₃₂ : x₁ + 1 / x₁ - 2 = (x₁ - 1) ^ 2 / x₁ := by
              field_simp [h₅₁.ne']
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> field_simp [h₅₁.ne']
              <;> ring_nf
            have h₅₃₃ : (x₁ - 1) ^ 2 / x₁ ≥ 0 := by
              apply div_nonneg
              · exact sq_nonneg (x₁ - 1)
              · linarith
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      exact h₅
    have h₃ : sInf {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x} = (6 : ℝ) := by

      have h₄ : IsLeast {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x} (6 : ℝ) := by
        refine' ⟨h₁, _⟩
        intro x hx
        have h₅ : x ≥ (6 : ℝ) := h₂ x hx
        linarith

      have h₅ : sInf {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 > (0 : ℝ), ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (6 : ℕ) - (x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (6 : ℕ)) - (2 : ℝ)) / ((x_1 + (1 : ℝ) / x_1) ^ (3 : ℕ) + (x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ) + (1 : ℝ) / x_1 ^ (3 : ℕ))) = x} = (6 : ℝ) := by
        rw [IsLeast.csInf_eq h₄]
      exact h₅
    exact h₃

  rw [h_main]
  <;> simp_all
  <;> norm_num
